availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - See Krueger's comments + 2nd discalimer "“Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.” + lin2=> ⲡⲉϥⲏ ⲓ(¨) (add diaresis); lin3=> <:[.?].1ⲡⲥⲁϩⲟⲩ= PN L. Vanderheyden|ed|[.?]ⲡⲥⲁϩⲟⲩ:> lin4=> ⲛⲡ<:δευτερονόμιον=grc|reg|ⲧⲉⲩⲧⲉⲣⲟⲛⲟ4.- [ⲙⲓ]ⲟ̣ⲛ:> (rests of an omincron are visible on the image); ⲡⲉϥⲏ ⲓ(¨) (add diaresis); lin8=> <:ⲟⲩⲟⲛⲏϥ(?)|reg|ⲟⲛϩⲟⲩ:>; lin9=> ⲉⲣⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ (delete ⲉ); the rest of the text is fine to me

Vote - AcceptText - Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.
lin1=> lost.?lin lin3=> 3.- (add hyphen); ⲛⲡ<:δευτερονόμιον=grc|reg|ⲧⲉⲩⲧⲉⲣⲟⲛⲟ4.- [ⲙⲓⲟ]ⲛ:> ⲃⲱⲕ lin6=> ⲧⲉ<:γραφή=grc|reg|ⲅⲣⲁⲫⲏ:> (take ⲉ out of loanword) lin7=> ⲡⲉⲧⲛⲁⲣ ϩⲟⲧⲉ (add space) lin10=> ⲉⲃⲟⲗ (delete one beta)
Submit - Entered text according to O.Crum 78. I think I got all the Greek loan words. Maybe Deuteronomium in lins3-4?

div.ab:
ⲕⲏ ⲍⲁⲭⲁⲣⲓⲁⲥ
ⲡⲉϥⲏⲓ ⲛϥⲃⲟⲧϥ ⲉ
ⲡⲥⲁϩⲟⲩⲡⲥⲁϩⲟⲩ ⲛⲡδευτερονόμιονⲧⲉⲩⲧⲉⲣⲟⲛⲟ
ⲙⲓⲟⲛ ⲃⲱⲕ ⲉϩⲟⲩⲛ ⲉⲡⲉϥⲏⲓ ⲛϥⲃⲟⲧϥ
ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ⲛⲧⲉⲛⲥⲁϩⲟⲩ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ ⲛ
ⲧⲉγραφήⲅⲣⲁⲫⲏ ⲉⲓ ⲉϩⲣⲁⲓ ⲉϫⲱϥ ⲛϥⲃⲟ
ⲧϥ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ⲡⲉⲧⲛⲁⲣ ϩⲟⲧⲉ ϩⲏⲧϥ ⲙ
ⲡⲓἀφορισμόςⲁⲫⲟⲣⲓⲥⲙⲟⲥ ⲛϥⲟⲩⲟⲛⲏϥⲟⲛϩⲟⲩ ⲉ
ⲃⲟⲗ ⲉⲣⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ ⲥⲙⲟⲩ ⲉⲣⲟϥ
ⲛϥⲕⲱ ⲛⲁϥ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ
